2.2.1 开始被撫摸手指 未允许 好意 口上文
2.2.2 开始被撫摸手指 未允许 敌意 口上文
2.3.2 睡眠中 被撫摸手指 口上文
2.3.1 时停中 被撫摸手指 口上文
2.1.2 指令失败拒绝 被撫摸手指 有允许 口上文

zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_1: $self$没有抽回手，反而顺势将手指嵌入了$target$的指缝中，与$target$十指紧扣。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_2: $self$感觉到指尖传来的温度，嘴角不自觉地上扬，轻轻回握了一下。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_3: $self$低头看着两人交叠的手，用拇指轻轻摩挲着$target$的手背，神情变得柔和。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_4: $self$并没有说话，只是将身体重心稍微向$target$那边倾斜，默许了这个亲昵的动作。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_5: $self$显然被这突如其来的触碰吓了一跳，身体僵硬了一下，但并没有立刻躲开。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_6: $self$瞪大了眼睛看着$target$的动作，似乎大脑还在处理这个超乎常规社交礼仪的行为。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_7: $self$的手指微微颤抖，眼神中充满了困惑，却不知为何没有反抗。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_8: $self$有些尴尬地张了张嘴，最后什么也没说，只是任由$target$握着手。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_9: $self$的脸色瞬间变得苍白，身体止不住地轻微发抖，却不敢把手抽回来。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_10: $self$死死地咬着下唇，视线恐惧地盯着地面，像是一只受惊却不敢逃跑的小动物。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_11: $self$的手指冰凉且僵硬，全身肌肉紧绷，显然正在忍受极大的心理不适。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_Begin_12: $self$眼眶微红，呼吸急促，在$target$的视线下被迫保持着这个姿势。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_1: $self$发出均匀的呼吸声，对手指上传来的触感毫无察觉，睡颜依旧恬静。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_2: $self$的手被$target$随意摆弄着，偶尔手指会因为神经反射而轻微抽动，但并没有醒来的迹象。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_3: $self$完全沉浸在深层睡眠中，任由手指被一根根分开、抚摸，毫无防备。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_4: $self$在这个漫长的过程中只是翻了个身，手依旧软绵绵地任人宰割。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_5: $self$保持着原本的姿势一动不动，对手指上发生的任何猥亵或把玩没有任何反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_6: $self$的世界是静止的，无论手指被摆弄成什么羞耻的形状，表情依旧凝固在上一秒。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_7: $self$就像一尊精美的人偶，毫无知觉地任由$target$的手指在她指尖游走、摩挲。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_8: $self$指尖的触感无法传递给大脑，$self$只是静止在这个瞬间，成为$target$手中的玩物。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_9: $self$像是触电般迅速缩回了手，有些慌乱地把手藏到了身后。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_10: $self$轻轻拍掉了$target$的手，嗔怪地瞪了$target$一眼："别闹，很痒。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_11: $self$不动声色地抽回手，拿起旁边的水杯抿了一口，假装什么都没发生。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_12: $self$叹了口气，把手抽出来并在衣服上擦了擦："手上全是汗，黏糊糊的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_13: $self$礼貌而不失尴尬地笑了笑，巧妙地借着整理文件的动作抽回了手。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_14: $self$后退了半步，刻意保持着社交距离："我想我们还没熟到这种程度。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_15: $self$温和地挡开了$target$的手，语气客气却带着疏离感："请自重。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_16: $self$有些为难地看着$target$："这样不太好吧，会被别人误会的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_17: $self$像是碰到了脏东西一样猛地甩开手，眼神凌厉地瞪着$target$。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_18: $self$冷笑一声，后退一步并嫌恶地拍了拍被碰过的地方："你有病吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_19: $self$毫不客气地一把推开$target$，声音冰冷刺骨："别用你的脏手碰我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_20: $self$警惕地抱紧双臂，做出了防御姿态："再动手动脚我就报警了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_21: $self$的呼吸变得有些急促，脸颊染上了一层红晕，手指无意识地在$target$掌心画圈。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_22: $self$完全放松下来，头轻轻靠在了$target$的肩膀上，享受着这份静谧的亲昵。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_23: $self$像是玩上瘾了，开始反过来把玩$target$的手指关节，眼神里满是依赖。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_24: $self$轻声嘟囔了一句："你的手真的很暖和……" 然后将手握得更紧了。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_25: $self$原本僵硬的肩膀慢慢放松下来，看向$target$的眼神中少了几分戒备，多了几分探究。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_26: $self$似乎适应了这个温度，手指不再紧绷，甚至表现出了一丝微妙的好奇。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_27: $self$脸上的尴尬逐渐消退，取而代之的是一种复杂的沉默，任由时间流逝。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_28: $self$低着头，原本想要抽回手的意图似乎随着时间的推移而动摇了。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_29: $self$终于忍受不了这种无意义的接触，用力抽回了手并甩了甩："好了，差不多行了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_30: $self$眉头紧锁，这种长时间的接触让$self$感到一种莫名的焦躁："一直这样你不觉得奇怪吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_31: $self$变得僵硬起来，眼神开始游移，显然已经在这个动作中耗尽了耐心。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_32: $self$借着撩头发的动作强行中断了接触，身子往旁边挪了挪。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_33: $self$忍耐到了极限，猛地站起身，椅子在地板上划出刺耳的声响："够了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_34: $self$眼里的恐惧逐渐转变为厌恶，用力挣脱了束缚，呼吸急促不稳。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_35: $self$虽然没有说话，但眼泪已经在眼眶里打转，屈辱感让$self$浑身发冷。
zh-cn.com_touch_fingers_36: $self$咬牙切齿地盯着$target$："这下你满意了吗？放开我！"

en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_1: $self$ didn't pull back; instead, she interlaced her fingers with $target$'s, holding hands tightly.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_2: Feeling the warmth from the fingertips, $self$'s lips curled up involuntarily, gently squeezing back.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_3: $self$ looked down at their intertwined hands, gently rubbing the back of $target$'s hand with her thumb, her expression softening.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_4: $self$ didn't say a word, simply leaning her weight slightly towards $target$, silently permitting the intimate gesture.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_5: $self$ was clearly startled by the sudden touch, her body stiffening for a moment, but she didn't pull away immediately.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_6: $self$ stared wide-eyed at $target$'s action, her brain seemingly struggling to process this breach of social etiquette.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_7: $self$'s fingers trembled slightly, her eyes filled with confusion, yet for some reason, she didn't resist.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_8: $self$ opened her mouth awkwardly but said nothing in the end, simply letting $target$ hold her hand.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_9: $self$'s face instantly turned pale, her body trembling uncontrollably, yet she dared not pull her hand back.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_10: $self$ bit her lower lip hard, staring fearfully at the ground like a startled small animal too scared to run.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_11: $self$'s fingers were ice-cold and stiff, her muscles tense, clearly enduring immense psychological discomfort.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_Begin_12: $self$'s eyes turned red, her breathing rapid, forced to maintain this posture under $target$'s gaze.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_1: $self$ breathed evenly, completely unaware of the touch on her fingers, her sleeping face remaining peaceful.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_2: $self$'s hand was manipulated by $target$ at will; occasionally her fingers twitched from reflex, but she showed no sign of waking.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_3: $self$ was deep in slumber, defenseless as her fingers were separated and caressed one by one.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_4: $self$ merely turned over during the long process, her hand remaining limp and at anyone's mercy.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_5: $self$ remained motionless in her original pose, showing no reaction to any molestation or play with her fingers.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_6: $self$'s world was frozen; no matter what shameful shapes her fingers were bent into, her expression remained stuck in the previous second.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_7: $self$ was like an exquisite doll, insensate as $target$'s fingers wandered over and rubbed her fingertips.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_8: The tactile sensation on her fingertips couldn't reach her brain; $self$ simply stood frozen in time, a plaything in $target$'s hands.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_9: $self$ retracted her hand as if shocked by electricity, hurriedly hiding it behind her back.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_10: $self$ gently slapped $target$'s hand away, glaring reproachfully: "Stop it, that tickles."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_11: $self$ quietly withdrew her hand and took a sip from a nearby cup, pretending nothing had happened.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_12: $self$ sighed, pulling her hand out and wiping it on her clothes: "My hands are sweaty and sticky."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_13: $self$ gave a polite but awkward smile, skillfully using the pretext of organizing documents to withdraw her hand.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_14: $self$ took a half-step back, maintaining social distance: "I don't think we're close enough for this."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_15: $self$ gently blocked $target$'s hand, her tone polite but distant: "Please show some respect."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_16: $self$ looked at $target$ with difficulty: "This isn't appropriate, people might get the wrong idea."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_17: $self$ flung her hand away as if touching something filthy, glaring sharply at $target$.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_18: $self$ sneered, stepped back, and disgustedly patted the spot that was touched: "Is there something wrong with you?"
en-us.com_touch_fingers_19: $self$ pushed $target$ away rudely, her voice icy cold: "Don't touch me with your dirty hands."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_20: $self$ vigilantly crossed her arms in a defensive posture: "Touch me again and I'm calling the police."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_21: $self$'s breathing quickened slightly, a blush coloring her cheeks as her fingers unconsciously traced circles in $target$'s palm.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_22: $self$ relaxed completely, resting her head gently on $target$'s shoulder, enjoying the quiet intimacy.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_23: $self$ seemed to get addicted to it, starting to play with $target$'s knuckles in return, her eyes full of dependence.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_24: $self$ murmured softly: "Your hands are really warm..." and then held on tighter.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_25: $self$'s previously stiff shoulders slowly relaxed, her gaze towards $target$ holding less wariness and more curiosity.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_26: $self$ seemed to adapt to the temperature, her fingers no longer tense, even showing a hint of subtle curiosity.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_27: $self$'s embarrassment faded, replaced by a complex silence as she let time pass.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_28: $self$ lowered her head; her initial intention to pull back seemed to waver as time went on.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_29: $self$ finally couldn't stand the meaningless contact, pulling her hand back forcefully and shaking it: "Alright, that's enough."
en-us.com_touch_fingers_30: $self$ frowned, the prolonged contact causing an inexplicable irritation: "Don't you find it weird doing this for so long?"
en-us.com_touch_fingers_31: $self$ stiffened, her eyes wandering, clearly having lost patience with the gesture.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_32: $self$ used the excuse of tucking her hair back to forcibly break the contact, shuffling her body away.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_33: $self$ reached her limit and stood up abruptly, the chair scraping harshly against the floor: "Enough!"
en-us.com_touch_fingers_34: $self$'s fear turned into disgust as she forcefully broke free, her breathing rapid and unsteady.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_35: $self$ didn't speak, but tears were welling up in her eyes, humiliation making her whole body cold.
en-us.com_touch_fingers_36: $self$ stared at $target$ through gritted teeth: "Are you satisfied now? Let me go!"
